inputs.titre: Construction de la Sainte-Chapelle à Paris par Saint Louis pour abriter les reliques de la Passion

reason: This image contains several anachronisms making it completely unsuitable for depicting the construction of Sainte-Chapelle in 1242. The presence of modern cars, modern clothing on the worker (t-shirt and jeans), modern metal scaffolding, and generally the style of the other buildings in the background are all clear indicators that the image is set in modern times.
